- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
      Project: "Generative AI in Fashion Sustainability" web application
      Languages: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
      Features: Multiple pages with eco-friendly theme, design generation, sustainability scoring, demand prediction, weather integration

- [x] Scaffold the Project
      Project successfully scaffolded with complete file structure:

  - index.html (main homepage)
  - CSS files (style.css, animations.css)
  - JavaScript files (main.js, weather.js)
  - All 4 required pages created
  - Images and pages directories created

- [x] Customize the Project
      Project fully customized with all requested features:

  - Home page with eco-friendly theme and statistics
  - AI Design Generator with material selection and sustainability scoring
  - Sustainability Score Analyzer with comprehensive analysis
  - Demand Prediction system with AI algorithms
  - Weather integration with fashion recommendations
  - Responsive design with smooth animations

- [x] Install Required Extensions
      No additional extensions required for HTML/CSS/JavaScript project

- [x] Compile the Project
      Project compiled and configured with:
- package.json with development scripts
- VS Code tasks for development server
- Performance monitoring and data persistence
- Settings panel and API configuration

- [x] Create and Run Task
      Created VS Code tasks.json with multiple tasks:
- Start development server (npm start)
- Install dependencies
- Build for production
- Alternative HTTP server
  Tasks are ready to use with Ctrl+Shift+P > "Tasks: Run Task"
